description: CompositionYellow sleeveless kurta made of 100% cotton, has a round neck with sequin detailing on the yoke, and has a split hemFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this yellow kurta from w!
